creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Jan 22 02:43:35 2013
New Revision: 310797
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310797

Log:
  - Update to 3.0.4
  - Convert to new Makefile header
  - Add LICENSE
  - Remove Author: line from pkg-descr
  
  PR:		ports/174691
  Submitted by:	tota
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (voldern@hoeggen.net, >3 weeks)

Modified:
  head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/Makefile
  head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 02:35:53 2013	(r310796)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 02:43:35 2013	(r310797)
@@ -1,24 +1,22 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for: rubygem-ruby_parser
-# Date created:		18 June 2009
-# Whom:		Espen Volden aka voldern <voldern@hoeggen.net>
-#
+# Created by: Espen Volden aka voldern <voldern@hoeggen.net>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	ruby_parser
-PORTVERSION=	2.3.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.4
 CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
 MAINTAINER=	voldern@hoeggen.net
 COMMENT=	A ruby parser written in pure ruby
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-sexp_processor>=3.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-sexp_processor
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-sexp_processor>=4.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-sexp_processor
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
 RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/ruby_parse
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/ruby_parse \
+		bin/ruby_parse_extract_error
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/distinfo	Tue Jan 22 02:35:53 2013	(r310796)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/distinfo	Tue Jan 22 02:43:35 2013	(r310797)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/ruby_parser-2.3.1.gem) = d9a4daeb41da89db62c6ba4d31facedac7b181fa5c3ba20b4256bad8cb4fc434
-SIZE (rubygem/ruby_parser-2.3.1.gem) = 80384
+SHA256 (rubygem/ruby_parser-3.0.4.gem) = f5ba8c07f8495d77b63c87d575ca5727ce46b375661c6aaac3567398ee9ac7be
+SIZE (rubygem/ruby_parser-3.0.4.gem) = 140800

Modified: head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/pkg-descr	Tue Jan 22 02:35:53 2013	(r310796)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-ruby_parser/pkg-descr	Tue Jan 22 02:43:35 2013	(r310797)
@@ -3,5 +3,4 @@ racc--which does by default use a C exte
 the same as ParseTree's output: s-expressions using ruby's arrays and
 base types.
 
-Author: Ryan Davis (zenspider) <ryand-ruby@zenspider.com>
 WWW: https://github.com/seattlerb/ruby_parser
